title: verbena filicaulis var. australis
intro: Verbena filicaulis var. australis, also known as the Australian leaf verbena, is a variant of the verbena filicaulis plant, a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Verbena filicaulis var. australis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
